atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports an inability to donate blood due to anemia and fatigue.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a long-standing history of iron deficiency anemia, dating back to age 13.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling fatigued frequently throughout the day.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing occasional feverish chills.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports episodes of wheezing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports headaches.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports heavy menstrual periods prior to her hysterectomy in 1996.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports it was performed approximately five to six years ago with no polyps noted.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient currently takes ferrous sulfate 25 mg twice daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient currently takes vitamin B12 over-the-counter.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any history of sedation issues.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any pacemaker or defibrillator use.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies sleep apnea.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies oxygen use at night.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ferrous sulfate 25 mg twice daily with orange juice

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ferrous sulfate 25 mg twice daily with orange juice to enhance absorption

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a referral to a hematologist

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an upper endoscopy

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a colonoscopy

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a capsule endoscopy

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in four weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
